priorities.text: Submit current Lever build to App Store as planned
Upgrade Mac Mini RAM and diagnose build resource exhaustion

priorities.source: Agent Hosting & Deployment Platform — Using the Hub to host, manage, and deploy guide agents externally. Making faith journey guides accessible on 3rd party apps and platforms. Hub becomes the agent management layer.

agentHandled.text: Design production-grade Mosaic CI/CD architecture with monitoring

Extend CVS-003 to include agent orchestration architecture
Design consent-based engagement depth model with privacy safeguards
